email.waitlist.subject: You're on the waitlist!
email.waitlist.heading: You're on the waitlist!
email.waitlist.body: Thanks for signing up for Tokistack. We'll notify you as soon as your spot is ready.
email.waitlist.nextItem1: You'll be among the first to try Tokistack when it's ready.
email.waitlist.nextItem2: We'll send your invite link as soon as core features are testable.
email.waitlist.nextItem3: No fixed timeline — we'd rather ship something solid than rush it.
email.footer: Tokistack — You received this email because you signed up for the waitlist.
